'''Bloxians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Bloxia system/Legends|Bloxia system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref><ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|species=[[Bloxian]]|system=Bloxia [[Star system/Legends|system]]|legends=1}}</ref>. The species was characterized by their large size and [[Color/Legends|red-hued]] skin. Members of this species included [[Bakk]] and [[Chokk (Bloxian)|Chokk]], enforcers for the [[Pliith]] loan shark [[Linkaas]].<ref name="BF" />
